title: automate new item on one board to create new group on another board

posts.author: miamenzies (Mia Menzies)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love an automation that can create a new group in a board based off a new item being added in a different board. For example I have a main project management board, a new “item” would be a new project. If a new project is added in this board, it would be amazing if a new group (project name) would be made in my Tasks board, where i can then build up all of my tasks for said project.
